title: Editas Medicine Analyst Price Targets and Stock Forecast
text: Six analysts covering Editas Medicine stock have consensus rating of Strong Buy with average price target of $4.92, forecasting 69.07% increase in stock price over next year. Lowest analyst target is $3.00 and highest is $8.00. According to 5 analysts, 12-month stock price target is $5.4, representing 86.21% increase from latest price. JonesResearch analyst Soumit Roy upgraded Editas Medicine to Buy with $8 price target. Clear Street raised firm's price target on Editas Medicine to $4.60 from $4 and kept Buy rating on shares. Average analyst rating for Editas Medicine stock is Strong Buy, indicating analysts believe stock likely to perform very well in near future and significantly outperform market. However consensus has shifted more cautious following discontinuation of reni-cel program and major workforce reduction in December 2024.
